insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use this hook.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing ones to avoid using the deprecated hook. They should also be aware that the block_progress capability is deprecated. The deprecation does not affect the functionality of existing extensions immediately, but it's essential to update them to ensure future compatibility. Developers can use alternative approaches to achieve similar functionality, such as using other hooks or capabilities provided by the Checkout UI extensions API.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not be directly affected by this deprecation, as it primarily concerns the development of checkout UI extensions. However, they may benefit from updated extensions that use newer, more efficient, and better-supported APIs.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is crucial because it encourages developers to adopt more modern and supported APIs, ensuring their extensions remain compatible with future versions of the Shopify platform. It also reflects Shopify's efforts to refine and improve its APIs, making development more efficient and effective.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, which may break existing implementations.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more gracefully, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs, eliminating the need for manual updates.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, featuring updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload, and long URL wrapping.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more granular market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS Extensions, App Pricing, and APIs

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. This allows for more flexibility in POS event observation and data synchronization.

themes.title: App Pricing and Shopify Flow
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Shopify Flow has also been updated with changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and automatic updates to Action runtime URLs.

themes.title: API Updates and Deprecations
themes.detail: The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree as of version 2026-10. The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, and the OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum returns a new value, FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED, for orders with no items to fulfill.

actions.text: Update POS Extensions to use the new background extension target
Review and update App Pricing plans to take advantage of new features
Update code to handle changes to Action extensions in Shopify Flow
Migrate to Admin GraphQL API version 2026-07 to use MarketRegionSubdivision
